reviews.comment:
No pude gosar del beneficio ACA. Me emitieron factura sin preguntar. En temporada está siempre hay cola para cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
I couldn't take advantage of the ACA discount. They issued me a receipt without asking. During peak season, there's always a line to get fuel.

reviews.comment:
Buenas atención pero no tenían pelotas. De promoción y la otra YPF si. Tres veces cargue nunca tienen stock

(Translated by Google)
Good service, but they didn't have balls. It was on promotion, but the other YPF station did. I've filled up three times, and they've never had them in stock.
